candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Cost of sales
candidates.why: This is the only explicit operating D&A row tied to the selected COGS bucket. It appears directly beneath 'Cost of sales' and is offset by 'Cost of sales - Balancing value', indicating it is a component already embedded within the selected parent row 'Cost of sales', so it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of sales'. The explicit D&A row is presented as a sub-component of that total, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortisation and depreciation of Research and development
candidates.why: This sits beneath 'Research and development expenses' and alongside other R&D sub-components, indicating it is embedded in the selected parent R&D expense row. Also, 'Research and development expenses' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so separately adding R&D D&A would distort the intended XSGA-XRD treatment.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Selling expenses
candidates.why: This appears directly beneath 'Sellingexpenses' with a corresponding balancing row, indicating it is a component already included in the selected 'Sellingexpenses' row.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Administrative expenses
candidates.why: This appears directly beneath 'Administrativeexpenses' with a corresponding balancing row, indicating it is a component already included in the selected 'Administrativeexpenses' row.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation included in Other income and expense
candidates.why: Despite the wording, it appears beneath the selected operating row 'Other operating expenses' with other sub-components and a balancing row, so it looks embedded in that selected parent bucket rather than a separate same-level add-on.

variables.notes: All visible SG&A-related D&A rows appear to be sub-components of already selected parent expense rows: Research and development expenses, Sellingexpenses, Administrativeexpenses, and Other operating expenses. Therefore no separate XSGA_DA rows should be added.
